PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOLPHIN GRAPHICS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEINSTEIN,NICKOLAS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WEINSTEIN,NICKOLAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DOLPHIN GRAPHICS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
